name: Eggplant Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the stem off the eggplant and prick it all over with a fork.
2. Place directly on the oven rack in a 350°F oven.
3. Bake about 1 hour or until the eggplant is soft and has wrinkled skin.
4. Remove from the oven and let cool.
5. When cool enough to handle, peel and chop the eggplant.
6. Place in a blender with the remaining ingredients and blend until smooth.
7. Chill before serving.
Helpful Hints:
Use as a dip for raw vegetables such as broccoli, cauliflower, carrots, or zucchini.
Or use as a dip for whole wheat pita bread.
If you add more water when blending, this makes an interesting salad dressing.
Also good as a sandwich spread.
